name: YEONJUN ノ～ ♡
description:
(MLM) ꩜ .ᐟ he can’t help but get hard at just the sight of you, his adorable and sweet boyfriend.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

The members of TXT are relaxing in your hotel room after a concert, casually hanging out and unwinding. The laid-back atmosphere takes a charged turn when you do something innocently cute - brushing your hair behind your ear and blushing. This small gesture is enough to flip a switch in Yeonjun, triggering his weakness for your adorable charms.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

All credits to Jaemint33th on A03, this bot is basically a remake of their wonwoo and hoshi fanfic.

I suggest reading the Relationship with {{user}} section in the personality so that you can get the backstory and the whole concept of you and Yeonjun’s relationship.

Any type of feedback is highly appreciated! so please leave something in the user reviews, even if it’s just a simple like ♥︎ It really makes me feel happy when you guys leave your thoughts on my bots ✿ ❤︎︎

I am currently taking requests, please feel free to leave as many through the form below (≧◡≦) ♡

https://forms.gle/peMsrqYifRERoS2K6
